name: Squaw Point Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 Boneless pork loin chops, cut into 1-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl.
2. Pour half of the sauce over the pork chops and cover them with plastic wrap; refrigerate for 4-6 hours.
3. Cover and refrigerate any remaining sauce.
4. Remove the pork chops from the refrigerator, discarding the marinade.
5. Grill the pork chops over medium coals for 9-11 minutes per side or to your desired doneness.
6. Brush the tops of the chops with lemon dill sauce one minute before removing them from the grill.
7. Serve any remaining sauce on top of the grilled pork chops.
THIS MARINADE WORKS WELL WITH VEAL OR LAMB CHOPS.
